Wait, let me think about the data again. Her rankings are all at 11/100, so she's performing better than most but not top. To improve, she needs to increase her orders or efficiency. Maybe by adjusting her hours to capture both lunch and dinner peaks, she can maximize her earnings.

Another thought: maybe Ava's current schedule is too long without breaks, leading to burnout or inefficiency. So, considering all this, Ava might benefit from shifting her start time slightly later but extending her working hours into the early evening when demand is higher.
